ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of unit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "strengths" TEXT /* Strengths of the unit */,
  "weaknesses" TEXT /* Weaknesses of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the unit */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the historical period */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the unit was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the unit's details were last updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the unit */,
  "historical_source" TEXT /* Historical source or document where the unit's details are derived */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Detailed list of equipment the unit uses */,
  "tactics" TEXT /* Common tactics associated with the unit */,
  "commander" TEXT /* Notable commanders who led the unit in historical battles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_unit_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_type_id") REFERENCES unit_types ("unit_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_types" (
  "unit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the unit type */,
  "tactical_role" TEXT /* General tactical role of the unit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the historical period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical period */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the historical period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the historical period */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the period */,
  "key_events" TEXT /* Major events or battles that define the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_period" (
  "unit_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit-period association */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the unit became active in the period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the unit ceased to be active in the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_period_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_period_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of unit statistics */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack strength of the unit */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense strength of the unit */,
  "movement_speed" INTEGER /* Movement speed of the unit */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the unit's attacks */,
  "morale" INTEGER /* Morale level of the unit */,
  "sustainability" INTEGER /* Ability to sustain prolonged combat */,
  "training_time" INTEGER /* Time required to train a unit */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost to field the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_statistics_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, strategist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the profile */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "custom_attributes" TEXT /* Custom attributes assigned to the unit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments about the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the profile was updated */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs who can view the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_profiles_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle scenario */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the battle scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the battle scenario */,
  "terrain" TEXT /* Terrain of the battle */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the battle scenario is set to begin */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the battle scenario is set to end */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the scenario was updated */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs who can view the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_scenarios_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_scenarios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_units" (
  "scenario_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario-unit association */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle scenario */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the unit in the scenario */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the unit on the battlefield */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the scenario-unit association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the scenario-unit association was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the unit in the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_units_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES battle_scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_units_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)
